title: The New Board View
excerpt: I tested out the new board view. I find the layout overwhelming and not easy on the eyes- too much outlined space…the solid colors, less going on is much nicer in my opinion, and much more easy to navigate and aesthetica…

posts.author: Chaya (Chaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
I tested out the new board view. I find the layout overwhelming and not easy on the eyes- too much outlined space…the solid colors, less going on is much nicer in my opinion, and much more easy to navigate and aesthetically pleasing to use!
thankfully, CS rep navigated me to change back using MondayLabs, but apparently this will be irreversible in a few weeks…!

posts.author: Sotiris (bootstraps)
posts.cookedHtml:
I agree,
the headers of the columns are very plain.
The overal look is a lot more like excel and less Monday…
But I have the feeling it reacts quicker.

You can vote here:

"New Experience" Board View looks too much like Excel Feature requests
The newly added, thankfully optional, board view has lots of new and exciting features; however, they took away the darker coloring out from behind each group and it’s respective tasks, and now the boards are too hard to look at. It is very plain, hard to visually follow one task because the borders that separate them are too thin and light. Personally, I like the original view better because of this, but I am disappointed I can’t access some of the new features that were a part of that update. …

posts.author: Chaya (Chaya)
posts.cookedHtml: I imagine the reaction is not based on the visual layout and can be integrated with the current style. I am not a developer, but @monday.com should consider this !
